articles.title: Photo scroll: Scenes from Boston’s ‘No Kings’ protest on March 28
articles.description:
Thousands are expected to rally on Boston Common in nationwide “No Kings” protests, with 160+ events across Massachusetts.

The post Photo scroll: Scenes from Boston’s ‘No Kings’ protest on March 28 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Thousands rallied on Boston Common for the 'No Kings' protest on March 28.
Over 160 events occurred across Massachusetts as part of the nationwide movement.
The protest highlights growing local dissatisfaction with political leadership and governance.

articles.title: Photos: ‘No Kings’ sparks protests in Europe
articles.description:
Rallies take place in solidarity with "No Kings" movement.

The post Photos: ‘No Kings’ sparks protests in Europe appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston residents join global protests supporting the 'No Kings' movement.
Protests occurred in multiple European cities, highlighting anti-monarchy sentiments.
Local activists plan future events to raise awareness about monarchy issues.
